requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — AGANOR, SEEG, and Lender Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——AGANOR、SEEG及融资方文件
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——AGANOR、SEEG及融資方文件

summary.en: For Gabon PV projects, the practical safety baseline for solar inverters should be IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence, even where the immediate gate is AGANOR conformity review, SEEG technical acceptance, EPC procurement, donor specifications, or lender due diligence rather than a single published inverter regulation. Because Gabon is equatorial and humid, safety documentation should also address enclosure ingress protection, condensation management, corrosion protection, creepage and clearance assumptions, temperature derating, ventilation, and installation instructions suitable for rainforest and coastal operating environments.
summary.zh: 对于加蓬光伏项目，太阳能逆变器的实际安全基准应为IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据，即使直接门槛是AGANOR合格评定审查、SEEG技术验收、EPC采购、捐助方规格或融资方尽调，而非单一公开逆变器法规。由于加蓬属赤道高湿环境，安全文件还应说明外壳防护等级、冷凝管理、耐腐蚀、爬电距离和电气间隙假设、温度降额、通风以及适用于雨林和沿海运行环境的安装说明。
summary.zht: 對於加彭光伏項目，太陽能逆變器的實際安全基準應為IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據，即使直接門檻是AGANOR合格評定審查、SEEG技術驗收、EPC採購、捐助方規格或融資方盡調，而非單一公開逆變器法規。由於加彭屬赤道高濕環境，安全文件還應說明外殼防護等級、冷凝管理、耐腐蝕、爬電距離和電氣間隙假設、溫度降額、通風以及適用於雨林和沿海運行環境的安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
AGANOR standards and conformity-assessment context for Gabon market documentation
SEEG project-specific equipment acceptance and commissioning conditions

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety evidence includes GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 reports or voluntary product certificates. These can document domestic performance and safety testing, but they are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates for Gabon projects. Chinese certificates may also omit humid tropical installation assumptions, French documentation, and project-specific SEEG or lender requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全证据包括GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004报告或自愿性产品证书。这些材料可证明国内性能和安全测试，但不会自动被加蓬项目接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。中国证书还可能缺少潮湿热带安装假设、法语文件以及SEEG或融资方项目特定要求。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全證據包括GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004報告或自願性產品證書。這些材料可證明國內性能和安全測試，但不會自動被加彭項目接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。中國證書還可能缺少潮濕熱帶安裝假設、法語文件以及SEEG或融資方項目特定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T or NB/T safety reports should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports for the exact model or certified family. Exporters should provide the constructional data package, bill-of-material critical components, firmware revision, nameplate, French or bilingual installation and safety manual where required, IP rating, corrosion and humidity assumptions, and derating curves for Gabon ambient conditions. For projects financed by development institutions, confirm whether ILAC-accredited laboratory reports or IEC CB Scheme certificates are required.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T或NB/T安全报告应补充涵盖特定型号或认证系列的IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告。出口商应提供结构数据包、关键零部件清单、固件版本、铭牌、必要时的法语或双语安装和安全手册、IP防护等级、耐腐蚀和湿度假设以及适用于加蓬环境条件的降额曲线。对于发展机构融资项目，应确认是否要求ILAC认可实验室报告或IEC CB体系证书。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T或NB/T安全報告應補充涵蓋特定型號或認證系列的IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告。出口商應提供結構資料包、關鍵零部件清單、韌體版本、銘牌、必要時的法語或雙語安裝和安全手冊、IP防護等級、耐腐蝕和濕度假設以及適用於加彭環境條件的降額曲線。對於發展機構融資項目，應確認是否要求ILAC認可實驗室報告或IEC CB體系證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where required by AGANOR conformity assessment, SEEG equipment acceptance, EPC procurement, donor or lender technical specifications, insurance, or project-owner HSE rules
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-route dependent for domestic China; China-only safety evidence is not a Gabon IEC safety acceptance decision

source.publisher: ISO member directory / AGANOR standards-body context

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T or NB/T inverter safety file should not be treated as sufficient for Gabon PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, tropical-environment installation assumptions, French or bilingual safety documentation where required, and model-family traceability before AGANOR, SEEG, EPC, donor, or lender review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅限中国GB/T或NB/T的逆变器安全文件视为足以满足加蓬光伏项目要求。应在AGANOR、SEEG、EPC、捐助方或融资方审查前准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据、热带环境安装假设、必要时的法语或双语安全文件以及型号系列可追溯性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅限中國GB/T或NB/T的逆變器安全文件視為足以滿足加彭光伏項目要求。應在AGANOR、SEEG、EPC、捐助方或融資方審查前準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據、熱帶環境安裝假設、必要時的法語或雙語安全文件以及型號系列可追溯性。
